'''Janodral Mizar''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] in the [[Indrexu sector/Legends|Indrexu sector]].

==History==
Circa [[25,126 BBY]], the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] was absorbed into [[Xim's empire|Xim's Empire]] as [[Xim/Legends|he]] expanded his borders from the [[Kingdom of Cron]].

In the vicinity of the planet [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] once fought a group of [[Zygerrian/Legends|Zygerrian]] [[Slavery/Legends|slavers]]. After defeating them he gave their [[Starship/Legends|ship]] to the slaves. Among these slaves were [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] historian [[Arhul Hextrophon/Legends|Arhul Hextrophon]] and his family. Jandoral Mizar had a law that stated that [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] or slaver victims split the profit if the pirates were captured or killed.

==Inhabitants==
By [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], Janodral Mizar boasted a population of 1 million to 100 million [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]].<ref name="TEA" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Heir to the Empire]]'' {{Ab|Heir to the Empire (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
